metadata.description: oh-my-gajaecode — the oh-my single-plugin suite for Gajae Code (gjc). One install, one native surface: 9 skills + 14 commands (/omg + 13 /omg:*).

plugins.name: oh-my-gjc
plugins.description: oh-my-gajaecode — one plugin, everything. A single install brings 9 trigger-word skills + 14 commands (/omg + 13 /omg:*), all surfaced natively as /omg:* commands and trigger-word skills: easy-answer (plain-language final answers), gate-briefing (domain-blind approval-gate briefings), plain-layer (choice translation + post-interview conversational spec polish + gate-briefing delegation; /omg:plain), multivendor model presets (grok quality + sol low + codex single-login + fable-codex safety-critical; session default=grok), extragoal (external fresh-context cross-family final review gate), branch-flow (per-repo dev/main git discipline + git-worktree parallel sessions via /omg:worktree), lazycodex-gjc (isolated external Codex+LazyCodex worker with no child GJC session), session toggles + always-on semaphores (~/.gjc/agent/SYSTEM.md), /omg:fable (Fable 5 adversarial safety audit), /omg:insane-review (GPT-5.6 Sol Pro web review), /omg:bugwatch-scan (gjc bug collector), and /omg:setup for optional model-preset merge + always-on toggles. Prerequisite-gated capabilities (Codex+LazyCodex for the bridge; ChatGPT subscription + Chromium for insane-review) install with the suite and self-diagnose at first run — install stays light and features guide you.
